summary: Michael Burry is still short Palantir (NASDAQ:PLTR). headline: High Growth Tech Stocks in the US Market to Watch
summary: Over the last 7 days, the United States market has remained flat, yet it has shown a significant rise of 28% over the past year with earnings forecasted to grow by 16% annually. In this context, identifying high growth tech stocks becomes crucial as they have the potential to capitalize on these favorable conditions and contribute positively to an investment portfolio.
